key.name: color-scheme
key.description: Preferred color scheme: follow the system, light or dark.

key.name: language
key.description: Language code for the interface, or empty to follow the system.

key.name: window-width
key.description: The last width of the main window.

key.name: window-height
key.description: The last height of the main window.

key.name: window-maximized
key.description: Whether the main window was maximized.
